name: Dr. Blackwell’s Restorative Tonic
description: A bottled patent medicine, widely advertised as a panacea. Restores a modest amount of health, but tastes of camphor and iron.

artwork.caption: A brown glass bottle with a faded label.

name: Collapsible Valise of Ingenious Design

effects.description: Can hold up to 10 normal items in a space no larger than a doctor's bag.

description: A cleverly engineered travel bag with spring-steel supports and hidden compartments. Expands to hold far more than it appears.

artwork.caption: A battered leather valise with brass clasps.

name: Galvanic Lantern

effects.description: Emits bright light in a 30-foot radius for 6 hours on a charge.

description: A portable electric lantern powered by a replaceable battery cell. Safer than oil, but prone to flicker in damp weather.

artwork.caption: A cylindrical lantern with a glass lens and wire handle.

name: Aetheric Detector

effects.description: Detects invisible gases, vapors, and some supernatural phenomena within 10 feet.

description: A brass-and-glass device with spinning needles and a faint hum. Used by investigators to reveal hidden dangers.

artwork.caption: A palm-sized device with dials and a cloudy glass dome.

name: Phlogiston Grenade
description: A glass sphere filled with volatile chemicals. When thrown, it bursts into a brief but intense fireball.

artwork.caption: A red-tinted glass sphere with a wax seal.

name: Mesmerist’s Pocket Watch

effects.description: Advantage on social checks to persuade or calm when used as a focus.

description: A silver watch with a swirling pattern on its face. Used by mesmerists and charlatans alike.

artwork.caption: A silver pocket watch on a chain.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Ring of Mind Shielding'.

name: St. Elmo’s Rod

effects.description: Can be used to jump-start machinery or revive a stunned ally once per day.

description: A copper rod topped with a glass sphere. Sparks leap from its tip when activated.

artwork.caption: A copper rod with a glass globe at one end.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Staff of Thunder and Lightning'.

name: Mourner’s Veil

effects.description: Wearer is less likely to be noticed or remembered in crowds.

description: A black lace veil traditionally worn at funerals. Said to grant a subtle anonymity to the grieving.

artwork.caption: A delicate black veil with intricate patterns.

name: Etheric Syringe

effects.description: May cause vivid hallucinations or temporary insight.

description: A glass-and-steel syringe containing a glowing blue liquid. Used in desperate circumstances.

artwork.caption: A syringe filled with blue fluid.

name: Clockwork Scarab

effects.description: Can be wound to crawl and deliver a tiny note up to 100 feet away.

description: A tiny mechanical beetle, exquisitely crafted. Used by spies and romantics alike.

artwork.caption: A brass scarab with jeweled eyes.
